chapter.title: Gospel of St. Matthew
chapter.incipit: Incipit Evangelium secundum liber generationis Ihesu Xristi, filii David, filii Abraham

chapter.title: Prologue and Book of St. Mark
chapter.incipit: Marcus Evangelista Dei, et Patri in baptismate
chapter.note: Fols. 36r-v: Prologue to Mark; fols. 36v-38r: Chapter list, termed "Breviarium;" fols. 39r-72v: Gospel of St. Mark

chapter.title: Prologue and Book of St. Luke
chapter.note: Fols. 72v-73r: Prologue to Luke, termed "Argumentum;" fols. 73v-77r: Chapter list, termed "Capitula;" fols. 78r-122v: Gospel of St. Luke

chapter.title: Prologue and Book of St. John
chapter.note: Fols. 122v-123v: Prologue to John, termed "Breviarius;" fols. 123v-124r: Chapter list, termed "Breviarius;" fols. 125r-155v: Gospel of St. John

chapter.title: List of pericopes for the liturgical year
chapter.note: List of pericopes for the liturgical year, termed "Capitulare;" ends imperfectly with St. Theodore (Nov. 9)
